headlines.title: UN chief fears for ‘millions’ of Palestinians amid UNRWA funding shortfall
headlines.snippet: UN chief Antonio Guterres fears for millions of Palestinians, denouncing disinformation and smear campaigns against the UN agency for Palestinian refugees (UNRWA). He stated that supporting UNRWA is the international community's responsibility toward Palestine refugees.

headlines.title: Iran says it couldn’t export a ‘single barrel of oil’ during US blockade

headlines.snippet: WHO evacuates 85 patients and companions from Gaza for treatment abroad The World Health Organization evacuated 85 people from the Gaza Strip on Tuesday for medical treatment abroad, with assistance from the Palestine Red Crescent Society.

headlines.title: Erdogan rejects Israeli move to recognise Armenian genocide
headlines.snippet: Türkiye's President Recep Tayyip Erdogan dismissed a proposal to recognize the mass killing of Armenians by the Ottoman Empire as genocide. He criticized Israel's actions in Gaza in response to the proposal.

headlines.title: Iran says it is pursuing diplomacy but remains ready for war
headlines.snippet: Iran's chief negotiator stated that while Tehran prioritizes diplomacy with the US, it remains prepared for war and will respond accordingly if dialogue is not implemented. Discussions between Iranian and US delegations were expected in Doha.

headlines.title: Qatari prime minister meets US envoys for talks on Iran negotiations
